runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP targeted recheck - v8.12.60 QA-0624 regressions
coveredSurfaces: Production version API - PASS v8.12.60 commit 12c58e7338b5fccf7529cca0ac5729ec16d297b0
Vercel Analytics 404 regression - PASS no /_vercel/insights/script.js request and no 404 after opt-in gate
Vercel Speed Insights after Analytics gate - PASS /_vercel/speed-insights/script.js 200 and vitals 200
Dashboard AI sidebar P13/Q-NEW34 single-server CPU+memory - PASS api-was-dc1-01 CPU 72%, memory 56%
Dashboard AI sidebar Q-NEW48 CPU low + memory high - PASS monitoring-metric-current returned CPU <= 50% AND memory >= 80% condition
Dashboard AI sidebar Q-NEW48 current-slot no-match handling - PASS returned no matching servers for 17:20 KST instead of generic fleet health summary
skippedSurfaces: Broad route pack - skipped; this run only rechecked QA-20260527-0624 failed surfaces fixed in v8.12.60
Host Map/server detail tabs/P17/P14/P10/Q3 - skipped; already passed in QA-20260527-0624 and unchanged by this fix
Vision live image QA - skipped; no Vision routing/provider change

expertAssessments.rationale: The two AI routing regressions from QA-20260527-0624 were rechecked on Vercel production after v8.12.60 deploy and both now use deterministic monitoring-metric-current evidence.
The Web Analytics 404/MIME regression is closed by opt-in gating; Speed Insights remained healthy.
The recheck used Playwright MCP against the production URL and only covered the failed modified surfaces requested by the user.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after v8.12.60 production deploy and targeted Playwright MCP recheck; effective usage 17.9292 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no billed overage observed.

completedImprovements.title: Vercel Web Analytics script loads without production console errors
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.60 Playwright MCP landing/network check showed no /_vercel/insights/script.js request and no 404/MIME failure after gating Web Analytics behind NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_VERCEL_WEB_ANALYTICS.
completedImprovements.note: Web Analytics collection remains opt-in until the Vercel project setting and env flag are intentionally enabled.

completedImprovements.title: Q-NEW48 CPU 낮고 메모리 높은 역상관 복합 조건 필터
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.60 Playwright MCP AI sidebar prompt 'CPU는 낮고 메모리는 높은 서버 찾아줘' returned monitoring-metric-current with condition CPU <= 50% AND 메모리 >= 80%; current slot had no matching servers.
completedImprovements.note: The no-match result is data-correct for 17:20 KST and confirms the regression from generic monitoring-server-health summary is closed.

completedImprovements.title: P13/Q-NEW34 single-server CPU+memory query returns both requested metrics
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.60 Playwright MCP AI sidebar prompt 'api-was-dc1-01의 CPU와 메모리 상태를 같이 알려줘' returned api-was-dc1-01 CPU 72%, 메모리 56% via monitoring-metric-current.

notes: Release decision for the tested regression scope: go.
Web Analytics is intentionally opt-in; enabling collection later requires Vercel project Web Analytics to be active plus NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_VERCEL_WEB_ANALYTICS=true.
